title: Dyeable Tools
description: Allows tools to be made dyeable.
body:
# This pack will not receive any updates in the future.
## It uses features that only very briefly existed in the game to be able to work without a resource pack, and I do not currently have plans to overhaul it.

This data pack can make your tools dyeable, without requiring a mod or resource pack installed on the client!

![Making a tool dyable.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85ce34882cafd16f6456157dd920d66f88059a11.png)

In order to make a tool dyeable, combine it with a Phantom Membrane and a piece of dye in a smithing table. After that, you are able to redye it with any combination of dye you want in a crafting table!

![Redying a white diamond sword to be pink.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/219d476f8c77a5bf8eaf5a3c7662633c6f44de3f.png)

There are some known issues with no known solution as of now, due to the way this data pack actually functions:
- Dyed shovels, axes, and hoes no longer have their secondary right click functions.
- Dyed diamond tools cannot be upgraded to Netherite.
